Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Data and Process Flow: Normal Flow: Register Order Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment. Case 1001: Follows normal flow perfectly. Case 1002: Anomaly. Confirm Shipment and Ship Goods before Perform Credit Check and Validate Stock. Case 1003: Anomaly. Ship Goods before Confirm Shipment. Missing Validate Stock. Case 1004: Major Anomaly. Receive Payment before everything else. Missing Credit Check and Validate Stock.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify Anomalies: Anomaly 1: Sequence Violations. Case 1002: Shipping before Credit Stock. Case 1003: Shipping before Confirmation. Case 1004: Payment before Invoice Credit Stock. Anomaly 2: Missing Activities. Case 1003: Missing Validate Stock. Case 1004: Missing Perform Credit Check Validate Stock. Anomaly 3: Timing Anomalies. Case 1002: Shipment close to registration. Case 1004: Payment soon after registration.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Hypotheses: Policy Violation: Rush orders bypassing checks. System Error: Events logged out of order or missing. Fraud: Payment before invoice suspicious. Process Deviation: Priority orders skip steps. Data Integrity: Timestamps show violations.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Draft SQL Queries: Query 1: Credit Check after Shipment. Query 2: Missing Validate Stock. Query 3: Payment before Invoice. Query 4: Priority orders compliance. Query 5: Resources outside department.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Refine SQL Queries: Use CTEs. Join tables. Rely on timestamp for sequence. Self-Correction: Timestamp safer than event_id.

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Self-Correction on event_id: Event_id global but timestamp reliable for process order.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Final Review: Meets requirements. SQL valid. Grounded in data. Case 1002 priority. Case 1004 standard suspicious. Resource check no violation in sample.
